name: Bug report
about: Something behaves or renders incorrectly, with the fix's Definition of Done
labels: needs-triage
---

**Actual:**

## Reproduction

<!-- Steps, route/component, browser/viewport, and any console errors. -->

## Acceptance criteria (Definition of Done)

<!-- What must be true for the fix to be accepted (ADR-0018, step 6). A regression test (component or e2e) that fails before and passes after is the strongest form. -->

- [ ] Regression test reproduces the bug (red) and passes after the fix (green).
- [ ]

## Notes

<!-- Affected components/routes, related issues, suspected cause. If the data shape looks wrong, check whether it's an API contract drift (see stellar-api). -->
